meaning: n.笔记,短信,(外交)照会,注解,注释,票据,纸币,音符vt.注意,记录,笔记
examples: Someone left this note for you.
She scribbled a note in pencil.
He didn't play one bum note.
There are scores of locations still in existence but one of special note includes Mission Dolores.
So, on that note, we want to give out a really cool phone -- read on!
